text_original:
1 Look at a rat, — it has its skin ;
But a man shall be without dignity of demeanour.
If a man have no dignity of demeanour,
What should he do but die ?
text_normalized:
1 Look at a rat, — it has its skin ;
But a man shall be without dignity of demeanour.
If a man have no dignity of demeanour,
What should he do but die ?
